summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-29, REQ-30, REQ-31) by updating logo references in Layout.tsx and SplashScreen.tsx to point to the graduation cap emblem image at '/assets/generated/logo.dim_200x200.png'. However, there is no evidence in the diff that the actual image file was uploaded or saved to the specified path (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png).

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the current logo image file with the newly uploaded graduation cap emblem image in frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files and does not include evidence of the image file being saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png. Only code references were updated to point to logo.dim_200x200.png, but the actual image file upload is not visible in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: The code references '/assets/generated/logo.dim_200x200.png' instead of the specified path '/assets/generated/logo.png'
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest and all requirements specify the image path as 'frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png', but the implementation uses 'logo.dim_200x200.png' which appears to be a different filename convention not requested in the spec.
